title: Amtech E1868 2 Piece Diamond File Set
features: TOUGH: This set includes a half round taper and a flat diamond file with 100mm (4") blades and tough, 120 grit diamond coatings
FOR PRECISION FILING: With comfortable soft-grip handles for ease of use, they are ideal for the precision filing of hard materials
SIZE CAPACITY: 100 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and tool products come with a 36 month assurance and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No
